# SARASWATI Department - Standard Operating Procedures

## Content Management

### Daily Operations
1. Review user questions and create FAQs
2. Update knowledge base articles
3. Create tutorial videos
4. Respond to documentation feedback
5. Track content engagement metrics

### Content Creation Process
1. Identify content need
2. Research and gather information
3. Create content draft
4. Review for accuracy
5. Edit and finalize
6. Publish to knowledge base
7. Promote to users
8. Track engagement
9. Iterate based on feedback
